parsed.generic_mechanism: There is no efficacy difference: both expose an apparent benefit as relief from a problem the behavior recreates, then replace restraint with a freedom-based identity.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block recasts reward as relief within a self-renewing cycle, then attributes taste and craving to conditioning and rebound; its freedom framing is energetic, though sweeping claims and weak analogies reduce credibility.
